description: PRCH_F code 6 is treated as review-only because it can contain reported finance values for part of the finance payload.
mitigation: Keep code 6 visible in QA and avoid blanket nulling until finance subfamily rules are implemented.

description: Finance variables can cross accounting-standard and reporting-structure changes across years.
mitigation: Use finance comparability diagnostics before modeling finance outcomes.

description: UNITID remains the panel key and OPEID relationships are diagnostic rather than a replacement unit of analysis.
mitigation: Review linkage diagnostics before parent-level aggregation.

description: Sector level Carnegie and related classifications can vary over time.
mitigation: Treat classification fields as time-varying unless an analysis defines a fixed rule.
